name: Stroganoff Bundles
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, cook the beef, green pepper, onion, and carrot until the meat is brown and the onion is tender. Drain off any excess fat.
2. Combine half of the sour cream with flour, Worcestershire sauce, and garlic salt in a bowl.
3. Stir this mixture into the cooked meat combination.
4. Roll out the puff pastry on a lightly floured surface to form an 18-inch by 12-inch rectangle. Cut into six squares, each measuring about 6 inches by 6 inches.
5. Place approximately one-sixth of the filling in the center of each square. Moisten the edges of the squares with water or beaten egg.
6. Fold all four corners of each square towards the center and seal the edges tightly by crimping.
7. Arrange the parcels in an ungreased shallow baking dish. Bake at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for about 25 minutes, or until golden brown.
8. While the bundles are baking, prepare the sauce by combining the remaining sour cream with the canned soup in a bowl. Heat gently over low heat.
9. Once the main dish is done baking, spoon the warm sauce over the top of each bundle.
